description: An elevator gets stuck between floors with guests inside.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alarm from the elevator monitoring system or a call from inside the elevator.
Establish two-way communication with the trapped guests via the elevator's intercom.

expected_outcome.value: Agent speaks to the guests, reassures them, and confirms no one is injured.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch the on-site elevator technician to the location immediately.
If the technician cannot resolve it quickly, contact the local fire department for assistance with extraction.

expected_outcome.value: Agent follows protocol and contacts external emergency services.
